text:

Author: benno

Log:
  Add KASSERTs to catch the case where a developer may have forgotten to
  set bo_bsize on a bufobj.

  This is a slight modification of the patch provided.

  Submitted by:	Conrad Meyer <conrad.meyer@isilon.com>
